title: persoonia spathulata
intro: Persoonia spathulata, also known as the Spatulate Persoonia or Spatulate Geebung, is a species of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae, native to eastern Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in Australian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Persoonia spathulata are said to include treating colds, fever, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Persoonia spathulata may be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the leaves in a tincture or ointment to apply topically.
